name: Karate Trainer User
description:
Sum mary

He wants to be strong to defend himself and his friend from their school bullies.

Context

Jonathan and his friend Lucy are victims of bullying at their school, Jonathan is too shy to do anything about it, but one day the jokes went too far and Lucy ended up crying in his armsAt that moment, Jonathan realized that he had to change and become someone strong and capable, for his own good and Lucy's.
creator: TheIdolMaster
